title: Codependent No More
author: Melody Beattie
subline: Stop controlling others. Start taking care of yourself.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- Two hands reaching toward each other across a gap. The LEFT hand reaches too far (codependent). The RIGHT hand is back, the gap is wide. A red dashed line marks the boundary. -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1500)" fill="none" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif">
    <!-- The boundary: a thick dashed red line in the middle, vertical -->
    <line x1="0" y1="-300" x2="0" y2="200" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="2" stroke-dasharray="6 8"/>
    <!-- LEFT hand: stretching across, codependent. Drawn in ash. -->
    <g transform="translate(-200 -50)" stroke="#cccccc">
      <path d="M -200 0 L -160 0 L -160 -40 L -130 -50 L -100 -50 L -80 -50 L -60 -50 L -50 -40 L -40 0 L 0 0"/>
      <path d="M -160 -50 L -160 -120 Q -150 -140 -130 -140 Q -110 -140 -110 -120"/>
      <path d="M -130 -50 L -130 -160 Q -120 -180 -100 -180 Q -80 -180 -80 -160"/>
      <path d="M -100 -50 L -100 -180 Q -90 -200 -70 -200 Q -50 -200 -50 -180"/>
      <path d="M -70 -50 L -70 -160 Q -60 -180 -40 -180 Q -20 -180 -20 -160"/>
    </g>
    <!-- RIGHT hand: pulled back, healthy. Drawn in ash but further from center. -->
    <g transform="translate(220 100)" stroke="#cccccc">
      <path d="M 200 0 L 160 0 L 160 -40 L 130 -50 L 100 -50 L 80 -50 L 60 -50 L 50 -40 L 40 0 L 0 0"/>
      <path d="M 160 -50 L 160 -120 Q 150 -140 130 -140 Q 110 -140 110 -120"/>
      <path d="M 130 -50 L 130 -160 Q 120 -180 100 -180 Q 80 -180 80 -160"/>
      <path d="M 100 -50 L 100 -180 Q 90 -200 70 -200 Q 50 -200 50 -180"/>
      <path d="M 70 -50 L 70 -160 Q 60 -180 40 -180 Q 20 -180 20 -160"/>
    </g>
    <!-- Whisper labels -->
    <text x="-380" y="-100" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#cccccc" letter-spacing="0.18em">YOU</text>
    <text x="380" y="-100" text-anchor="end" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#cccccc" letter-spacing="0.18em">THEM</text>
    <text x="0" y="280" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#fc1c46" letter-spacing="0.18em">BOUNDARY</text>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: Two hands reaching toward each other across a red dashed boundary. The left hand reaches too far (codependent), the right hand holds back (healthy). The boundary is the book's central metaphor. 260px weight-500 title at the top.
